_meta.description: Persona definitions for 'vibe init'. Each persona installs a tailored stack. Pick the one closest to you; mix-and-match later.

personas.name: AI Operator
personas.tagline: I run a small business and AI does most of the heavy lifting. I want voice agents, lead pipelines, automations that just keep running.
personas.post_install_hint: Set up your AI agent next (Claude Code is recommended). Run 'vibe scan' on your first project to generate a CLAUDE.md.

personas.name: Web Vibe Coder
personas.tagline: I ship landing pages, marketing sites, and small web apps. Static HTML, Netlify deploys, Stripe checkout.
personas.post_install_hint: Install the Netlify CLI when you ship your first site: 'npm install -g netlify-cli'. Login: 'netlify login'.

personas.name: Solo Founder
personas.tagline: I'm building a SaaS or service business by myself. Backend + payments + lead capture + analytics. Time-to-ship matters more than perfection.
personas.post_install_hint: Recommended next steps: 'gh auth login', 'stripe login', set up Bitwarden CLI with 'vibe-setup-bitwarden'.

personas.name: Terminal Native
personas.tagline: Just give me the shell. No GUI. I want AI agents accessible from a tmux pane.
personas.post_install_hint: VS Code skipped on purpose. You're free.

personas.name: Curious Beginner
personas.tagline: I run a small business. I keep hearing 'AI can do that' but I've never written code. Install the minimum so I can try it without breaking anything.
personas.post_install_hint: Welcome. Open VS Code, install the 'Claude Code' extension from the marketplace, and start a chat. The AI does the typing; you decide what you want to build.
